title: HG Bathroom Cleaner Shine Restorer, Bath Cleaner & Light Limescale Remover, Bathroom Floor Cleaner & Sink Cleaner, Bathtub Cleaner, Shower Spray Liquid & Toilet Cleaner - 500ml (Packing May Vary)
features: HG Bathroom Cleaner: Cleans and brings back the shine to sanitary appliances including washbasins, bathtubs, toilet pans, taps, shower trays and tiles. Effective bathroom tile cleaner and descaler
Shine restorer: Gentle on surfaces but tough on deposits. Highly concentrated and leaves a wonderful shine. Safe sanitary cleaner for glaze, chrome, enamel, plastic or painted surfaces
Non abrasive: Does not contain scouring agents or aggressive components. Removes bath oil marks, soap residues, skin grease and light limescale from your bathroom, shower room or en suite
Fresh fragrance: Does not streak and regular use prevents limescale build up. Mild yet effective on porcelain goods; can be used as as bath floor cleaner, bathroom tile cleaner or grout cleaner
Includes: 1 x HG Natural Stone Cleaner, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, including HG Limescale Remover, grout cleaner, mould remover and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Bathroom Cleaner and Shine Restorer is a fast-acting, effective sanitary cleaner for regular use on all sanitary appliances. The multi-action formula cleans and restores shine to sinks, bathtubs, shower enclosures, toilets, taps, flooring and tiles. The sanitary cleaner and bath shine has a fresh fragrance and removes oil marks, soap residues, skin grease and light limescale, leaving no streaks. Regular use of the cleaner and descaler helps prevent limescale build up. The highly concentrated, easy-to-use cleaner does not contain scouring agents, but leaves a streak-free shine on glaze, chrome, enamel, glass, plastic, tiles or painted surfaces. Includes: 1 x HG Bathroom Cleaner and Shine Restorer (500ml) How to use: 1. Put a few drops on a damp sponge and clean the surface thoroughly 2. Rinse or wipe off with a cloth 3. Apply a thin line of bathroom cleaner along the edge of the bathtub and clean with a sponge 4. Pour into a bucket of water for mopping floors and cleaning walls Keep out of reach of children. Always read the label. Discover HG professional's wide range of household cleaning products, including HG Grout Cleaner, shower screen protector spray, multi-purpose cleaners, multi-surface cleaner and all-purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Box Contains 1 x 500ml
